theme_overview.archetype: Archetype 5 (Luxury) mixed with elements of Archetype 7 (Futuristic/Electric) for deep states.
theme_overview.vibe: Serene, sacred, high-end, futuristic, deep, mysterious. Immersive ambient space.
theme_overview.core_concept: High-end Glassmorphism over dynamic, breathing gradient meshes. UI elements feel like frosted glass suspended in the void.

typography.strategy: Elegant sans-serif hierarchy blending geometric structure with organic readability. Soft contrast opacity for metadata.

breath_sphere.concept: Central organic Pulsing Breath Sphere. Expands on inhale, holds, retracts on exhale.
breath_sphere.implementation: Use Skia Canvas with sweeping radial gradients and displacement maps or Reanimated scaling.

transitions.screen_push: Smooth spring-physics transitions using React Navigation custom interpolators.
transitions.haptic_gesture: Use expo-haptics. impactAsync(ImpactFeedbackStyle.Heavy) on session start confirm.

1_onboarding.layout: Full screen cinematic video/mesh background. Bottom 30% features glass pane with bilingual welcome text and 'Start Assessment' button.
features: Interactive diagnostic glass cards for personalization

2_breathwork_home.layout: Scrolling vertical list with generous padding. Sticky glass header.
2_breathwork_home.content: 3 main tier cards (Beginner, Inter, Adv). Each expands into specific activity chips (Pre-Workout, Sleep, etc.)

3_meditation_grid.layout: Masonry or 2-column grid. Each card represents a Branch.
3_meditation_grid.design: Cards use branch-specific subtle gradient backgrounds with heavy glassmorphism blur over them. Minimalist iconography.

4_branch_detail.layout: Immersive hero header with dynamic mesh background of the branch's color system. Scrollable list of levels and sessions below.
features: Mentor greeting overlay logic (first time entry)

5_session_intercept.content: Prerequisite checklist (Environment guidelines). 'Slide to Confirm' or 'Long Press to Start' with haptic feedback.
5_session_intercept.audio_matrix: Toggles for Vocal Guide, Ambient Acoustic Layer, Custom Audio.

6_breath_player.content: Central organic Pulsing Breath Sphere. Tiny metadata (progress, phase text) at bottom. Tapping screen reveals audio controls/pause.

branch_1_wealth.description: Abstract dark gold/amber curves. Use as background mesh for Wealth branch.

branch_3_deep_sleep.description: Cosmic deep space nebula. Use as background mesh for Deep Sleep and Astral Projection.

branch_6_shifting.description: Abstract dark purple gradient. Use for Shifting branch.

branch_7_healing.description: Dark green bioluminescent abstract. Use for Healing branch.

branch_11_mind_silence.description: Abstract deep space void/black hole. Minimalist black. Use for Mind Silence.

media.icons: Use lucide-react-native. Avoid emojis. Icons must have a strokeWidth of 1.5 for elegance.

accessibility_and_testing.bilingual: Support RTL for Persian (I18nManager.forceRTL). Ensure font families swap elegantly based on active locale.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements (Touchables, Buttons, Toggles) MUST have a `testID` attribute (e.g., testID="breathwork-tab", testID="start-session-btn").
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over glass components meets minimum 3:1 APCA contrast ratio. Use text-shadow if necessary to separate from bright gradient spots.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use React Native and Expo. Ensure all components are written in .js (not .tsx as per environment constraints). Use StyleSheet for styling. Implement glassmorphism using expo-blur <BlurView>. For the complex background meshes, utilize @shopify/react-native-skia Canvas with fluid sweeps or fallback to simple linear gradients wrapped in animated views. Use expo-haptics for gestures. Provide the complete implementation logic combining these premium components.
